sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO promotion (name, discount_type, discount_val, start_date, end_date, status) VALUES (#name#, #discountType#, #discountVal#, #startDate#, #endDate#, 'ACTIVE') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.select:
SELECT promotion_id, name, discount_type, discount_val, start_date, end_date, status FROM promotion
status = #status# end_date >= #today#
ORDER BY promotion_id
SELECT promotion_id, name, discount_type, discount_val, start_date, end_date, status FROM promotion WHERE promotion_id = #promotionId#

SELECT cp.product_id, p.name, p.category, p.price, CASE pr.discount_type WHEN 'F' THEN pr.discount_val WHEN 'R' THEN (p.price * pr.discount_val / 100) ELSE 0 END AS computed_discount, (p.price - CASE pr.discount_type WHEN 'F' THEN pr.discount_val WHEN 'R' THEN (p.price * pr.discount_val / 100) ELSE 0 END) AS final_price FROM campaign_product cp JOIN product p ON cp.product_id = p.product_id JOIN promotion pr ON cp.promotion_id = pr.promotion_id WHERE cp.promotion_id = #promotionId# ORDER BY cp.product_id

SELECT pr.promotion_id, pr.name, pr.discount_type, pr.discount_val, CASE pr.discount_type WHEN 'F' THEN pr.discount_val WHEN 'R' THEN (p.price * pr.discount_val / 100) ELSE 0 END AS COMPUTED_DISCOUNT, CASE WHEN #today# BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date THEN 'IN_WINDOW' ELSE 'OUT_OF_WINDOW' END AS WINDOW_STATE FROM campaign_product cp JOIN promotion pr ON cp.promotion_id = pr.promotion_id JOIN product p ON cp.product_id = p.product_id WHERE cp.product_id = #productId# AND pr.status = 'ACTIVE' AND #today# >= pr.start_date AND #today# <= pr.end_date ORDER BY COMPUTED_DISCOUNT DESC

SELECT pr.promotion_id, pr.name, pr.discount_type, pr.discount_val, CASE pr.discount_type WHEN 'F' THEN pr.discount_val WHEN 'R' THEN (p.price * pr.discount_val / 100) ELSE 0 END AS COMPUTED_DISCOUNT FROM campaign_product cp JOIN promotion pr ON cp.promotion_id = pr.promotion_id JOIN product p ON cp.product_id = p.product_id WHERE cp.product_id = #productId# AND pr.status = 'ACTIVE' AND #today# BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date ORDER BY COMPUTED_DISCOUNT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE pr.discount_type WHEN 'F' THEN pr.discount_val WHEN 'R' THEN (p.price * pr.discount_val / 100) ELSE 0 END),0) FROM product_option po JOIN campaign_product cp ON po.product_id = cp.product_id JOIN promotion pr ON cp.promotion_id = pr.promotion_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE po.option_id = #optionId# AND pr.status='ACTIVE' AND #today# BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date

SELECT promotion_id, name, discount_type, discount_val, start_date, end_date, status, CASE WHEN end_date < #today# THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN end_date <= #soon# THEN 'EXPIRING' ELSE 'OK' END AS LIFECYCLE FROM promotion
status = #status#
ORDER BY end_date
